full_text:
Big omental tumor with some fibrotic tissue.

Tumor was minced in 30 ml of AdF++ with dispase and DNAse according to the protocol.

RBC lysis was done using 4ml of the buffer.

Final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of the culture medium

Cell count 1):

total: 6.4 E6

live: 4.03 E6

viability: 62.5 %

size: 8.4 um

Cell count 2):

total: 6.4 E6

live: 3.9 E6

viability: 61.9 %

size: 8.4 um

Average cell count: 6.4 E6 / mL

Total volume: 5 mL

Total cell count: 3.2 E7

Cell count from 10 times dilution

1):

total: 8.15 E5

live: 4.52 E5

viability: 55.4 %

size: 8.6 um

Cell count 2):

total: 7.3 E5

live: 5.05 E5

viability: 68.9

size: 8.9 um

Total cell count: 7.7 E5 / mL

Dilution * 10 = 7.7 E6 /mL

Total volume: 5 mL

Total cell count: 3.5 E7

Average of two cell counts = 3.5 E7 per 5 mL

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

14 conditions, 6 replicates per condition = 84 wells

84 wells x 40

1000 cells/µl = 1.12 E6 * 3 tubes

6 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1120 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

897.5

158 µl

µl

µl

µl

Plate 40 uL per well in 48 well plate * 4 see the map below.

300 uL medium + 50 ul of diluted drugs per well same day for ATRi and ATXi combinations and next day for anti-TIGIT combinations.

B) Drug treatment for IF (384 well plate):

20 uL per well of the omentum gel mixture prepared above was plated in 384 well plate. The gel was allowed to solidify for 1hr in the cell culture incubator, followed by addition of 25 ul of culture medium per well. Followed by dispensing of the drugs using TECAN drug dispenser

For ATXi and ATRi single and combination treatment for flow cytometry analysis

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL (prepare 600uL)

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2

IC50 of ATRi (Berzosertib (VE-822) is 19 nM on cell lines (https://www.selleckchem.com/products/ve-822.html)

Stock concentration of ATRi is 10mM, dilute to 0.1 mM in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

IC50 of ATXi Ziritaxestat (GLPG1690) is 130 nM on cell lines (https://www.medchemexpress.com/GLPG1690.html)

Stock concentration of ATXi is 1mM, dilute to 0.1 mM (for 48 well plate), and 1mM for (384 well plate) in DMSO and use it for further dilutions indicated in this table

Prepare 3 mg /mL pembrolizumab for treatment in 384 well plate

Prepare 0.75% Tween 20 in 1xPBS = 75uL tween 20 + 10 mL of 1x PBS

Dilute stock Pembrolizumab (5mg/mL) to get a final concentration of 0. 3% tween 20 = 15uL of stock pembrolizumab + 10mL of 0.75 % Tween 20.

(for 48 well plate), and 1mM for 384 well plate

TECAN Drug dispensing layout can be found at: P:\h345\afarkkilab\Projects\iPDC\Drug testing\Drug treatment reports_Tecan\2024-01-29_Drug treat_S263_pOme

48 well map for ATRi and ATXi treatment

01.02.2024

On day 3 of the culture set-up and post drug treatment with ATRi and ATXi, the cultures from 48 wells were harvested for flow cytometry and the supernatants were collected and stored at -80.

The cells from 384 wells were stained with live/dye, fixed with 4%PFA and stored at +4.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
